candidates.marginal_policy: 3-point indexed AGI surtax above $100,000 single and $200,000 joint plus full-rate current taxation of foreign income of U.S. corporations
candidates.automatic_corridor: surtax 2.5 to 3.5 points, maximum 0.25-point annual step; no automatic corporate change

candidates.marginal_policy: no additional tax or program change beyond the common package
candidates.automatic_corridor: no automatic tax or service change

return_formats.fiscal: annual machine-readable table plus methods report
return_formats.distribution: machine-readable cells with disclosure controls plus methods report
return_formats.service: domain metrics, thresholds, failure findings, and dissent
return_formats.legal: question-by-question authority, risk, remedy, and unresolved issue
return_formats.implementation: critical path, owner, dependency, cost, capacity, and failure mode

comparison_rules: use identical baseline, window, GDP, interest, incidence, implementation, and uncertainty conventions
score current law as the complete No case
do not use administrative savings as a balancing item
do not waive rights or continuity floors to close a gap
report candidate results in symmetric fields and precision
known_dependencies: a current baseline data release suitable for the requested window
program-level defense implementation detail beyond the high-level path
human-subject comprehension test governance and recruitment
